case_title: SF AUTOMOTIVE PARTS WAREHOUSE INC. DBA MACKENZIE - et al VS TERRY TIEU AKA THANH HAI TIEU.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,831.46 FILED BY SF AUTOMOTIVE PARTS WAREHOUSE INC. DBA MACKENZIE - - AUTOMOTIVE PARTS AS TO DEFENDANT TERRY TIEU AKA THANH HAI TIEU. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-30-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PLTF DECLARATION FILED; REQUEST TO RESCHDULE TRIAL.
TRIAL RESET TO SEP-30-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF AUG-30-2004 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TERRY TIEU AKA THANH HAI TIEU.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-30-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-12-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 FOR FUTHER TRIAL.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SF AUTOMOTIVE PARTS WAREHOUSE INC. DBA MACKENZIE - - AUTOMOTIVE PARTS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TERRY TIEU AKA THANH HAI TIEU. $3,831.46 PRINCIPAL, $106.37 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,937.83 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SC MOTION DISPOSITION NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR ORDER CORRECTING NAME IN JUDGMENT OF JUN-01-2005, GRANTED
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT TERRY TIEU AKA THANH HAI TIEU. HEARING SET FOR JUL-11-2005 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: JUN-27-2005 AS TO DEFENDANT TERRY TIEU AKA THANH HAI TIEU.
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF JUL-11-2005, DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT TERRY TIEU AKA THANH HAI TIEU.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT TERRY TIEU AKA THANH HAI TIEU.
